brief_notes: Well-written data descriptor paper presenting the DEBBIES dataset with clear motivation grounded in DEB theory and IPM framework. Strengths: thorough mathematical formulation of the DEB-IPM, good technical validation against independent data (r=0.82-0.91), useful comparison table with existing datasets, and clear conservation linkage. Weaknesses: no figures, relatively small species coverage (185 of >40,000 ectotherms), the deterministic density-independent assumption is a significant limitation not deeply explored, validation sample sizes vary (n=109-158), and the data availability section uses placeholder URLs. The PCA analysis of trait space is described but not shown. Repository URL and funding details are placeholders.
